cursorProjectRoot.description: Project directory that contains .cursor/ (ECC Cursor install target). Resolved relative to the directory containing ecc-prune.json. When set, the same remove.* rules are applied under <cursorProjectRoot>/.cursor/ using Cursor's flat rules layout (namespace-*.md). Use "." when ecc-prune.json lives at the project root.

rulesDirs.description: Subdirectory names under rules/ to delete entirely (e.g. php, perl)

skillDirs.description: Skill folder names under skills/ to delete

AGENTS.md.description: Replacement AGENTS.md → claudeHome/AGENTS.md; relative paths are resolved from the directory containing ecc-prune.json

plugin.json.description: Replacement plugin manifest → claudeHome/plugin.json; relative paths are resolved from the directory containing ecc-prune.json
